source_title: Synthesis of thin-multiwalled carbon nanotubes by Fe-Mo/MgO catalyst using sol-gel method
authors_or_assignee: Prashant Dubey; Sang Kyu Choi; Bawl Kim; Cheol Jin Lee
combo_key: Fe-Mo/MgO|citrate_sol_gel|air_700C | CH4 | quartz tube reactor | mixed t-MWCNT/MWCNT/carbon fiber
run_summary: Fe-Mo/MgO citrate precursor decomposed in air at 700 °C; methane CCVD at 900 °C produced a non-uniform mixture with low yield and TGA carbon content.
notes: Reported low-yield comparison condition retained; no reproduction priority or industrial score assigned. combo_key is calculated in the workbook.

source_title: Synthesis of thin-multiwalled carbon nanotubes by Fe-Mo/MgO catalyst using sol-gel method
authors_or_assignee: Prashant Dubey; Sang Kyu Choi; Bawl Kim; Cheol Jin Lee
combo_key: Fe-Mo/MgO|citrate_sol_gel|Ar_700C | CH4 | quartz tube reactor | t-MWCNT
run_summary: Fe-Mo/MgO citrate precursor decomposed in Ar at 700 °C; methane CCVD at 900 °C produced uniform t-MWCNTs with 452% weight-gain yield and 85% TGA carbon content.
notes: Highest reported weight-gain yield among the three runs; no industrial ranking assigned. combo_key is calculated in the workbook.

source_title: Synthesis of thin-multiwalled carbon nanotubes by Fe-Mo/MgO catalyst using sol-gel method
authors_or_assignee: Prashant Dubey; Sang Kyu Choi; Bawl Kim; Cheol Jin Lee
combo_key: Fe-Mo/MgO|citrate_sol_gel|H2_700C | CH4 | quartz tube reactor | t-MWCNT
run_summary: Fe-Mo/MgO citrate precursor decomposed in H2 at 700 °C; methane CCVD at 900 °C produced uniform t-MWCNTs with 370% weight-gain yield and 82% TGA carbon content.
notes: Reported H2-decomposition comparison to SG-2; no reproduction priority or industrial score assigned. combo_key is calculated in the workbook.
